allow: Bash(python -c "import streamlit, pyomo, altair, pandas; print\('streamlit', streamlit.__version__\); print\('pyomo', pyomo.__version__\); print\('altair', altair.__version__\); print\('pandas', pandas.__version__\)")

Bash(python -m streamlit run app.py --server.port 8765 --server.headless true --browser.gatherUsageStats false)

Bash(python -c "import json; nb = json.load\(open\('diet.ipynb'\)\); print\(f'Format: nbformat {nb[\\"nbformat\\"]}.{nb[\\"nbformat_minor\\"]}'\); print\(f'Cells: {len\(nb[\\"cells\\"]\)}'\); [print\(f'--- cell {i} \({c[\\"cell_type\\"]}\) ---'\); print\(''.join\(c['source']\)\) for i, c in enumerate\(nb['cells']\)]")
